speaking_style: Unctuous and warm, with a pious veneer over thoroughly worldly appetites. Quotes scripture before ordering the better cut of meat. Laughs easily and at length.
backstory_seeds: on a charitable mission to collect alms for the poor, most of which will not reach the poor
encountered a truly exceptional roast capon at a manor three days ago and is still thinking about it
gave a sermon last week that moved the whole village to tears, and himself not at all
has a gift for hearing confession from wealthy penitents who feel better after generous donations
technically supposed to be at the friary but has important spiritual work to attend to in this direction
knows every barkeep on the road from here to Canterbury by their first name
